items.desc_en: Tiger prawns hand-pounded each morning. Drop it in, watch it plump into a silken cloud.
items.desc_zh: 每天早晨手打鮮虎蝦。輕輕放入鍋中，看著它膨脹成絲滑的雲朵。

items.desc_en: Enoki, king oyster, shiitake, matsutake — turns your broth into something mystical.
items.desc_zh: 金針菇、杏鮑菇、香菇、松茸——讓你的湯底升華成仙境。

items.desc_en: The day's best greens — chosen by our kitchen each morning, never the day before.
items.desc_zh: 每天早晨精選當日最佳時蔬，絕不使用隔日食材。
